description: A holdback: a configured percentage of a gross payment withheld at release and paid only when a release condition is met (acceptance, or the end of a warranty period). Created/linked when an installment is processed with retention; the withheld amount is one of the netting terms that reduce the net release. Build-add: implied by the source payment terms but not previously modeled.

fields.name: identifier
fields.label: Retention Ref.
fields.validation: configurable pattern; unique; immutable once created
fields.purpose: Stable key that ties the holdback to its PO/invoice and to the later release event so a withheld amount can be tracked from withholding to release.

fields.name: poId
fields.label: Purchase Order
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when retention is held at PO level (the order carries the retention term)
fields.validation: PO exists; at least one of poId / invoiceId must be present
fields.purpose: Links the holdback to the order whose retention term created it so the release condition (acceptance/warranty) is evaluated against that order's deliverable.

fields.name: invoiceId
fields.label: Invoice
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when retention is held against a specific invoice's payment
fields.validation: invoice exists; at least one of poId / invoiceId must be present
fields.purpose: Links the holdback to the invoice payment it was withheld from so the withheld amount nets that payment's release and the released amount returns to the supplier later.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: supplier must exist; inherited from the PO/invoice
fields.purpose: Names the party whose money is held so the outstanding retention shows on the supplier creditor ledger until released.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master; inherited from the PO/invoice
fields.purpose: The retention currency; the base-currency sibling is FX-converted so the held figure and aging are normalized (axiom A12).

fields.name: withheldPercent
fields.label: Withheld Percent
fields.purpose: The configured percentage of the gross release to hold back; the rate the withheld amount is computed from and the figure shown on the retention term of the order.

fields.name: withheldAmount
fields.label: Withheld Amount
fields.validation: = gross release * withheldPercent; >= 0; deducted from the net release
fields.purpose: The money held back at this payment; the third netting term in the net release (net = approvedAmount - withholding - advance recouped - retention withheld) and the amount returned to the supplier on release.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: withheld -> released only when the release condition is met (acceptance, or warranty period elapsed)
fields.purpose: The lifecycle of the holdback: withheld while held, released once the condition is satisfied. Gates whether the amount is still deducted from the supplier or returned to them.

fields.name: releaseCondition
fields.label: Release Condition
fields.validation: acceptance (released on milestone/goods acceptance) or warranty (released after the warranty period elapses)
fields.purpose: Defines what unlocks the holdback: acceptance releases it once the deliverable is accepted; warranty holds it until the warranty period ends. Drives when status moves to released.

fields.name: releaseDueDate
fields.label: Release Due Date
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when releaseCondition == warranty (the warranty period end date)
fields.validation: valid date; the warranty-period end for warranty-conditioned retention
fields.purpose: The date a warranty-conditioned retention becomes releasable so the holdback is returned on time rather than held indefinitely.

fields.name: releasedAt
fields.label: Released At
fields.validation: set when the holdback is released; immutable thereafter
fields.purpose: Timestamps the release for the audit trail and to confirm the held money was returned to the supplier when its condition was met.

fields.name: paymentId
fields.label: Source Payment
fields.mandatoryCondition: set once the retention has been withheld from a Payment release
fields.purpose: Links the holdback to the Payment it was netted from so the withholding is traceable to a settlement record.

invariants: withheldAmount = gross release * withheldPercent; nets down the net release before disbursement
released only when releaseCondition (acceptance/warranty) is met
A13 audit + SSE on every committed change
at least one of poId/invoiceId must be set
